creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Checkout your ports tree again.  The error message you get is not even
possible in that exact wording if all of the LibreSSL 2.9.1 patches
from ports r501679 would have been applied.

Make sure you have

files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_build_cfgs.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_build_main.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_src_crypto.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_src_ssl.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl_build.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl_src_ssl_mod.rs
files/patch-vendor_openssl_src_version.rs
